narrative:
Bronson Township has 1,459 registered voters, with 50.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.3 percentage points.
